constitutional_layers.human: initiates request, reviews direction, approves when required, retains final continuation authority
constitutional_layers.AiGOL / AGOL: semantic direction governance, task packaging, replay, lifecycle, approval gates, mutation boundaries, quarantine, and transport
constitutional_layers.execution providers: bounded execution through governed transport only
constitutional_layers.observability: read-only replay, lifecycle, approval, boundary, result, and semantic direction visibility

operational_risks: semantic interpretation may be mistaken for execution authority
dispatch may be mistaken for unrestricted orchestration
sidepanel continuity may be mistaken for durable replay
future providers may blur execution and governance authority
next-step proposals may be mistaken for approved continuation
recommended_implementation_sequence: Define governed operational loop task and result package interfaces.
Bind loop state to existing AGOL Bridge lifecycle and replay artifacts.
Add read-only sidepanel visibility for loop stage and authority state.
Add explicit human approval checkpoints before dispatch.
Add provider adapter boundary tests for Codex without adding orchestration.
Add fail-closed tests for malformed packages, missing approval, and invalid transitions.
